segments.text: Now Ben-Hadad the king of Syria gathered all his forces together; thirty-two kings were with him, with horses and chariots. And he went up and besieged Samaria, and made war against it.
Then he sent messengers into the city to Ahab king of Israel, and said to him:
Thus says Ben-Hadad:
segments.speaker: Ben-Hadad

segments.text: Your silver and your gold are mine; your loveliest wives and children are mine.
segments.speaker: Ben-Hadad

segments.text: And the king of Israel answered and said:
My lord, O king, just as you say, I and all that I have are yours.
segments.speaker: Ahab

segments.text: Then the messengers came back and said:
Thus speaks Ben-Hadad, saying, 'Indeed I have sent to you, saying, "You shall deliver to me your silver and your gold, your wives and your children"
segments.speaker: Messengers

segments.text: but I will send my servants to you tomorrow about this time, and they shall search your house and the houses of your servants. And it shall be, that whatever is pleasant in your eyes, they will put it in their hands and take it.
segments.speaker: Ben-Hadad

segments.text: So the king of Israel called all the elders of the land, and said:
Notice, please, and see how this man seeks trouble, for he sent to me for my wives, my children, my silver, and my gold; and I did not deny him.
segments.speaker: Ahab

segments.text: Do not listen or consent.
segments.speaker: Elders and People

segments.text: Therefore he said to the messengers of Ben-Hadad:
Tell my lord the king, 'All that you sent for to your servant the first time I will do, but this thing I cannot do.'
segments.speaker: Ahab

segments.text: Then Ben-Hadad sent to him and said:
The gods do so to me, and more also, if enough dust is left of Samaria for a handful for each of the people who follow me.
segments.speaker: Ben-Hadad

segments.text: So the king of Israel answered and said:
Let not the one who puts on his armor boast like the one who takes it off.
segments.speaker: Ahab

segments.text: Suddenly a prophet approached Ahab king of Israel, saying:
Have you seen all this great multitude? Behold, I will deliver it into your hand today, and you shall know that I am the Lord.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: So Ahab said, 'By whom?'
By the young leaders of the provinces.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Then he said, 'Who will set the battle in order?'
You.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: And the prophet came to the king of Israel and said to him:
Go, strengthen yourself; take note, and see what you should do, for in the spring of the year the king of Syria will come up against you.
segments.speaker: Prophet

segments.text: Then a man of God came and spoke to the king of Israel, and said:

Because the Syrians have said, 'The Lord is God of the hills, but He is not God of the valleys,' therefore I will deliver all this great multitude into your hand, and you shall know that I am the Lord.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Because you have let slip out of your hand a man whom I appointed to utter destruction, therefore your life shall go for his life, and your people for his people.
segments.speaker: The Lord
